idea-plugin.name: Claude Code Sessions
idea-plugin.description:
Monitor and manage all running Claude Code CLI sessions directly from your JetBrains IDE.
  • See all active Claude sessions across all projects
  • Status indicators: Running, Waiting for Input, Waiting for Accept, Finished
  • Environment detection: shows whether sessions run in JetBrains or external terminal
  • Live CPU usage per session
  • Click to open the project or focus the terminal
  • Resume finished sessions in Terminal or JetBrains IDE
  • Search/filter sessions by name, path, or status
  • Sortable columns for easy session management
  • Desktop notifications when a session needs your attention
  • Cross-platform: macOS, Linux, Windows
Keyboard shortcuts:
  • Enter – Open/Resume selected session
  • F5 – Refresh sessions
  • Ctrl+F / Cmd+F – Focus search field
  • Delete – Kill selected session
  • Escape – Clear search
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0
  • Session environment detection (JetBrains vs Terminal)
  • Resume finished sessions with Terminal/JetBrains IDE choice
  • CPU usage column
  • Session search/filter
  • Sortable table columns
  • Keyboard shortcuts (Enter, F5, Ctrl+F, Delete)
  • Cross-platform support (Linux, Windows)
  • Fixed ProcessBuilder stream leaks
  • Optimized file I/O (single tail read per poll cycle)
1.0.0
  • Initial release

action.description: Refresh the list of Claude Code sessions
Start a new Claude Code session in the current project directory
